body:
### Bug description

```python
Hello,

I'm having this in my python code:

from pythoncom import CoInitialize

which results in "E0611:No name 'CoInitialize' in module 'pythoncom'"
```

### Configuration

```ini
I have added this to pyproject.toml:

[tool.pylint.main]
extension-pkg-whitelist = ["pythoncom"]
```

### Command used

```shell
pylint -vvv file.py
```

### Pylint output

```python
************* file.py
file.py:1:0: E0611: No name 'CoInitialize' in module 'pythoncom' (no-name-in-module)
```

### Expected behavior

CoInitialize shall be known.

### Pylint version

```shell
pylint 3.3.7
astroid 3.3.10
Python 3.12.0 (tags/v3.12.0:0fb18b0, Oct  2 2023, 13:03:39) [MSC v.1935 64 bit (AMD64)]
ruff 0.11.12
```

### OS / Environment

Windows 11

### Additional dependencies

```python

```

comments.body: Thank you for opening the issue, do you mind specifying the dependency required for pythoncom ?

Sorry, I missed that.
pythoncom is a module of pywin32 

I'm not sure, if this is realy lib specific. Please compare https://github.com/pylint-dev/pylint/issues/3997
Hi @Pierre-Sassoulas, do you have any update on this issue?
Everything happens in the issue itself, there's no company behind pylint it's all volunteers coordinating using github.

title: No name 'CoInitialize' in module 'pythoncom'
